Our Approach

Products That Solve Real Problems

We don't build products for the sake of technology. Each product in our portfolio was born from a genuine need—whether it's making AI accessible via WhatsApp, revolutionizing education, or digitizing healthcare for governments.

Our products are battle-tested in production environments, serving real users at scale. They represent our commitment to building AI that works reliably, ethically, and delivers measurable value.

Production Ready
Serving millions daily
Enterprise Grade
Secure & compliant

Featured

Our Product Portfolio

AI-powered solutions serving diverse industries

WhatsApp Native

D23.ai

India's first WhatsApp-native AI assistant that understands and responds in 11+ Indian languages. Send voice messages, generate images, check train PNR status, search the web—all within WhatsApp.

5000+
Active Users
1M+
Messages Processed
11+
Languages
Explore D23.ai

RoboGuru

AI-Powered Education

Intelligent tutoring system using computer vision and AI to help students learn. Take a photo of any problem and get step-by-step solutions instantly.

  • Photo-to-solution AI technology
  • Adaptive learning paths
  • Math, Science & more subjects
Learn More

OHGRT

AI Voice Generation Studio
4.8★ Rating
2M+ Downloads

Professional AI voice generation platform for content creators and enterprises. Create natural-sounding voices with voice cloning and video dubbing.

  • Text-to-speech generation
  • AI video dubbing
  • Voice cloning technology
Learn More

Xappy

Healthcare Management Platform
Gov Grade
Deployed in Sri Lanka

Comprehensive healthcare management for government health departments. Digitize patient records and streamline health services delivery at scale.

  • Electronic health records (EHR)
  • Multi-facility support
  • Health analytics dashboard
Learn More

JanSeva

AI Citizen Engagement Platform
95% Resolution Rate
6 Languages

AI-powered engagement platform for elected representatives. Connect with constituents via WhatsApp, manage grievances, and build digital presence—all automated.

  • 24/7 WhatsApp bot automation
  • Voice message support
  • Analytics & sentiment tracking
Learn More

WhatsApp Commerce

Sell on WhatsApp
98% Open Rate
45% Higher Conv.

Turn WhatsApp into your storefront. Product catalogs, native payments, automated checkout, and CRM integrations - sell where 500M+ Indians already are.

  • Product catalogs in WhatsApp
  • Native payment integrations
  • Automated checkout flows
Learn More

Our products serve organizations across multiple sectors

Citizen engagement, grievance management, and healthcare digitization for public sector.
